name: Priya Natarajan
research_summary: Develops interpretable deep learning models for healthcare diagnostics with focus on uncertainty quantification and model robustness in clinical settings
recent_work: Published work on transformer-based architectures for medical image segmentation with out-of-distribution detection
title: Assistant Professor

name: Marcus Chen
department: Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science
research_summary: Researches scalable optimization methods for large-scale distributed machine learning systems with applications to federated learning and privacy-preserving computation
recent_work: Lead author on a NeurIPS paper about communication-efficient gradient compression for federated training
title: Associate Professor

name: Elena Vasquez
research_summary: Studies algorithmic market microstructure and the impact of high-frequency trading on financial stability using agent-based simulation models
recent_work: Co-authored a paper on reinforcement learning approaches to optimal execution in fragmented equity markets
title: Assistant Professor

name: Raj Mehta
research_summary: Focuses on formal verification of smart contracts and consensus protocol design for scalable decentralized systems with provable security guarantees
recent_work: Developed a static analysis tool for detecting reentrancy vulnerabilities in Solidity contracts that found bugs in deployed DeFi protocols
title: Assistant Professor

name: Sarah Kim
research_summary: Applies graph neural networks to protein-protein interaction prediction and drug repurposing pipelines using multi-omics integration
recent_work: Recent publication on geometric deep learning for molecular property prediction in low-data regimes
title: Associate Professor

name: David Okonkwo
research_summary: Works on stochastic differential equations and their applications to modeling uncertainty in complex engineered systems including power grids and supply chains
recent_work: Published a methods paper on sparse polynomial chaos expansions for high-dimensional uncertainty propagation
title: Assistant Professor

name: Anika Patel
research_summary: Develops learning-based controllers for legged robots that generalize across terrains using sim-to-real transfer and domain randomization techniques
recent_work: Led a project demonstrating quadruped navigation in unstructured outdoor environments using only onboard perception
notes: Lab has history of involving undergrad researchers
title: Assistant Professor

name: James Liu
research_summary: Researches theoretical foundations of deep learning generalization including neural tangent kernel theory and implicit regularization in overparameterized networks
recent_work: Published in ICML on the relationship between sharpness-aware minimization and generalization bounds
title: Associate Professor

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
research_summary: Studies natural language understanding with emphasis on commonsense reasoning and knowledge-grounded dialogue systems for low-resource languages
recent_work: Released an open-source benchmark for evaluating commonsense reasoning in multilingual language models
notes: Actively recruiting for summer research program
title: Assistant Professor

name: Michael Torres
research_summary: Develops Bayesian nonparametric methods for causal inference in observational studies with applications to public health policy evaluation and clinical trial design
recent_work: Co-authored work on doubly robust estimators for heterogeneous treatment effect estimation under unmeasured confounding
title: Associate Professor
lab_name: Causal Inference and Decision Science Lab
